title: Artcut 100 PCS Mylar Bags, Holographic Bags, Baggies, Cute Small Plastic Bag, Mothers Day Gifts (Black, 2.4 * 3.9inch)
features: 【APPLICATION】Our holographic bags is waterproof after seal, good to store coffee, candy, sugar, rice, baking, cookie, nuts, dried fruit and flowers, snack, party favor and so on. It is also suitable for small business to package jewelry, eyelash,lip gloss, key chain, cosmetics, soap, electronic accessory or any small objects

【PREMIUM MATERIAL】Our resealable mylar bags are made of polyethylene, aluminum foil and mylar, it has tear resistance and durability. 100% food grade material, FDA and USDA compliant, non-toxic and tasteless, can be directly used in food packaging

【HOLOGRAPHIC RAINBOW COLOR】Our foil ziplock bags come with holographic rainbow color in the back and transparent in the front in order to display the product clearly. When displayed indoors, you don't need to have lots of lighting to see the beautiful rainbow color

【EASY TO USE】Our mylar bags are resealable that you can repeat open the zipper, the sealing strip is very tight and don't broken. Usage recommendation: Pinch both sides of the bag opening with your thumb and index finger, and open the bag with both hands.Thumbs are close to the zipper, and both hands forcefully open it

【SIZE & QUANTITY】- Measuring 2.4*3.9 inches, 100 pieces of resealable holographic bags in the package, enough for your daily use.Please note that the actual color may appear in a slight difference under different light,angle and screen
description: Product Description Appealing Appearance Our holographic bags are designed with a clear window and when you see through on one side you can see the product that's in them. The holographic back gives it amazing shining, shimmering, splendid color. Water-proof & Leak-proof The ziplock of our bags are well sealed. Even there is water splash on the surface of the bag, the inside item still remain dry and clean. Resealable Zipper Lock The quality is perfect, you can open and close them several times without ever being able to tell any difference, they still look unused. Safe Material These holographic resealable packing bags are made of polyethylene raw material, non-toxic and reliable material, you can put items in them safely.
